guardrails: The three normal-form families and clause templates are first-principles refinements of the Step 9+ error-fiber parity.
The 13 specific clause instances are the realized cells of the 15/49 matrix (item 7) and remain a finite certificate.
No public/PAPP widening or universal-24 claim is made.

metadata.description: The 13 B3 clause templates are first-principles refinements of the Step 9+ error-fiber parity; the three normal-form families are determined by intrinsic (defect, pair/triple incidence) data.

summary.next_task: Proceed to item 7 (the 15/49 matrix as an abstract theorem), the hardest residue.
summary.reading: Each clause template is forced: x is an error direction (Direction Lemma); at defect 4 the error set is {x} (NF1); at defect 6 the error space is 2-dim and x = xor of the two non-xor directions; the pair/triple witnesses are pair/triple xors of the selected signature. The family (NF1/NF2/NF3) is then a function of (defect, pair/triple incidence). So the three normal-form families and the clause relation-code shape are first-principles refinements of the Step 9+ error-fiber parity.
summary.scope_note: NOT atlas-independent: the 13 specific clause instances are the realized signature/profile cells -- the 15/49 matrix (item 7). Step 10+ fixes the clause TEMPLATES, not which instances occur.
